Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/Interpolat.description: Lagrange polynomial, Newton's divided differences, cubic splines, and Runge's phenomenon.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/Root-Findi.description: Bisection, Newton-Raphson, and secant methods with a Newton fractal visualisation.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/ODE-Solver.description: Forward Euler, Heun's (RK2), classic RK4, and Adams-Bashforth multi-step methods.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/Numerical-.description: Trapezoidal, Simpson's, and Gauss-Legendre quadrature with convergence analysis.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/FFT-Spectr.description: DFT, Cooley-Tukey FFT, power spectra, spectral differentiation, and Chebyshev polynomials.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/Chaos-Dyna.description: Logistic map, bifurcation diagrams, Lyapunov exponents, Lorenz attractor, double pendulum.

Mathematics/Numerical-Methods/Reaction-D.description: Gray-Scott model generating Turing patterns — spots, stripes, coral, and self-replicating structures.

Mathematics/TSP.description: Node/edge generation and TSP solving via graph theory and optimisation.

Analysis/Step-Detection.description: Detect abrupt step changes in noisy 1D data using rolling average and threshold.

Physics/Jupiter-Satellite-Orbits.description: Symplectic N-body simulation of the Galilean moons with energy conservation, Kepler verification, Laplace resonance, and 3D visualisations.

Physics/Percolation.description: Site, bond, and exotic percolation variants (gradient, explosive, bootstrap, invasion, directed) with Monte Carlo simulations and artistic visualisations.

Dev-Tools/workbench.description: Textual-based TUI that auto-discovers and runs every script in the repo.

Templates/LaTeX/A3 Exam Poster Template.description: Large-format revision poster template for dense, organised review sheets.

Templates/LaTeX/Info Sheet.description: Landscape A4 template for technical interview reference sheets with syntax highlighting.

Templates/LaTeX/Physics Poster Template.description: Competition-quality A0 poster template with tikzposter, SI units, and QR codes.

Mathematics.label: Hypothesis Testing
Mathematics.description: Interactive decision tree for selecting statistical tests, with practice problems.

Dev-Tools.label: Repo Dashboard
Dev-Tools.description: Terminal-based dashboard with language distribution, line counts, and colour-coded output.

Templates.label: Scientific Article
Templates.description: Clean, professional layout for scientific writing and reports.
